testcase.name: testAddGalaxyToCart
testcase.system-out:
... ... TestNG 7.9.0 by Cédric Beust (cedric@beust.com) ...
11:51:39.940 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34] Initialising ChromeDriver... 11:51:39.940 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - === Flow START | keyword: 'Galaxy' === 11:51:48.866 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33][Navigate] → https://www.amazon.in 11:51:49.085 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34][Navigate] → https://www.amazon.in 11:51:50.631 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Typing 'iPhone' into search box 11:51:50.632 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34][Type] attempt 1 → 'iPhone' 11:51:50.707 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Typing 'Galaxy' into search box 11:51:50.708 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33][Type] attempt 1 → 'Galaxy' 11:51:53.933 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33][Click] attempt 1 → By.xpath: //input[@id='nav-search-submit-button'] 11:51:54.086 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34][Click] attempt 1 → By.xpath: //input[@id='nav-search-submit-button'] 11:51:57.012 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Clicking first product for keyword 'iPhone' 11:51:57.013 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33][Click] attempt 1 → By.xpath: (//a[contains(., 'Galaxy') and contains(., 'Mobile')])[1] 11:51:57.400 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Switching to child (product) window 11:51:57.403 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - Clicking Add to Cart 11:51:57.430 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34][Click] attempt 1 → By.xpath: //div[@id='desktop_qualifiedBuyBox']//input[@id='add-to-cart-button'] 11:51:58.070 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - [Thread-33][Window] Switched to child: D6D81FF10823890A5D85C11273B498D9 11:51:58.138 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Clicking Add to Cart 11:51:58.139 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33][Click] attempt 1 → By.xpath: //div[@id='desktop_qualifiedBuyBox']//input[@id='add-to-cart-button'] 11:52:04.487 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Fetching cart subtotal price 11:52:04.488 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33][GetText] attempt 1 → By.xpath: //*[@id='sw-subtotal'] 11:52:04.690 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - >>> Price for 'Galaxy' = Cart subtotal: ₹10,499 00 [PRICE] Galaxy → Cart subtotal: ₹10,499 00 11:52:04.691 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - [Thread-33][Window] Back to parent: FC9F36F7E195EE52D507EFADC207DF41 11:52:04.843 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - === Flow END | keyword: 'Galaxy' === [TC2] Galaxy price from cart subtotal: Cart subtotal: ₹10,499 00
testcase.system-err: Jun 10, 2026 11:51:48 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jun 10, 2026 11:51:48 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. Jun 10, 2026 11:51:49 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jun 10, 2026 11:51:49 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testAddIphoneToCart
testcase.system-out: 11:52:04.850 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-1] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-33] Quitting browser. 11:52:05.060 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - >>> Price for 'iPhone' = Cart subtotal: ₹89,900 00 [PRICE] iPhone → Cart subtotal: ₹89,900 00 11:52:05.061 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - Closing child window and returning to parent 11:52:05.151 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34][Window] Closed child: 3D5ED00A6C9ECAE7F802EA3329271469 11:52:05.159 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.utils.DriverUtils - [Thread-34][Window] Back to parent: BE31EDB68DC2013E5EFAF3F5FE83EB1B 11:52:05.159 [TestNG-test-Amazon Cart Tests-2] INFO com.amazon.pages.AmazonPage - === Flow END | keyword: 'iPhone' === [TC1] iPhone price from cart subtotal: Cart subtotal: ₹89,900 00
